title: Arsène Lupin contre Arsène Lupin
writer: Georges Neveux, François Chavane, Édouard Molinaro
actors: Jean-Claude Brialy, Jean-Pierre Cassel, Françoise Dorléac
plot: André Laroche, an industrialist, has just passed away. Face to his grave, as he is being buried, Anne de Vierne, the wife of a magistrate, confesses to her son François that Laroche was in fact Lupin and that he is his natural chi...
